rows.text: Founded on our ethos, ‘Conserving as We Construct’ for three decades, CDL prioritises sustainable construction practices, incorporating low-carbon and energy-efficient technologies in the way we design, build and manage our buildings.
rows.source_sentence: Founded on our ethos, ‘Conserving as We Construct’ for three decades, CDL prioritises sustainable construction practices, incorporating low-carbon and energy-efficient technologies in the way we design, build and manage our buildings.

rows.text: Cooling and decarbonising by greening will be our strategic focus as we move towards a nature-positive future, by actively monitoring our processes and mitigating nature-related risks.
rows.source_sentence: Cooling and decarbonising by greening will be our strategic focus as we move towards a nature-positive future, by actively monitoring our processes and mitigating nature-related risks.

rows.text: By taking responsibility for our impact, we continue to build stakeholder confidence and long-term resilience for our business.
rows.source_sentence: By taking responsibility for our impact, we continue to build stakeholder confidence and long-term resilience for our business.

rows.text: Achieved BCA Green Mark Platinum SLE awards for City House, Palais Renaissance, The Orie, Norwood Grand and Union Square Residences
rows.source_sentence: Achieved BCA Green Mark Platinum SLE awards for City House, Palais Renaissance, The Orie, Norwood Grand and Union Square Residences

rows.text: Launched CDL SME Supplier Decarbonisation Queen Bee Programme with partners to empower our supply chain towards a low-carbon future
rows.source_sentence: Launched CDL SME Supplier Decarbonisation Queen Bee Programme with partners to empower our supply chain towards a low-carbon future

rows.text: 129 BCA Green Mark certifications for our developments and office interiors* – one of the leading private developers with most awarded BCA Green Mark Platinum certificates
rows.source_sentence: 129 BCA Green Mark certifications for our developments and office interiors* – one of the leading private developers with most awarded BCA Green Mark Platinum certificates

rows.text: First Singapore real estate company to roll out Green Lease campaign in 2014, in partnership with Tuas Power and supported by BCA, and first to launch the City Green Tenant Bonus Programme in 2024; achieved 100% retail and office tenant participation in CDL Green Lease Partnership Programme since 2017
rows.source_sentence: First Singapore real estate company to roll out Green Lease campaign in 2014, in partnership with Tuas Power and supported by BCA, and first to launch the City Green Tenant Bonus Programme in 2024; achieved 100% retail and office tenant participation in CDL Green Lease Partnership Programme since 2017

rows.text: First Singapore real estate developer to sign World Green Building Council’s (WorldGBC) Net Zero Carbon Buildings Commitment
rows.source_sentence: First Singapore real estate developer to sign World Green Building Council’s (WorldGBC) Net Zero Carbon Buildings Commitment

rows.text: Maintained Double ‘A’s in CDP for climate change (since 2018) and water security (since 2019)
rows.source_sentence: Maintained Double ‘A’s in CDP for climate change (since 2018) and water security (since 2019)

rows.text: Regulators, investors, insurers and banks are progressively using sustainability criteria alongside financial performance to evaluate companies’ long-term resilience and prospects.
rows.source_sentence: Regulators, investors, insurers and banks are progressively using sustainability criteria alongside financial performance to evaluate companies’ long-term resilience and prospects.

rows.text: We maintained our position on 14 international benchmarks and achieved double ‘A’s in the 2024 CDP A List for corporate climate action and water security.
rows.source_sentence: We maintained our position on 14 international benchmarks and achieved double ‘A’s in the 2024 CDP A List for corporate climate action and water security.

rows.text: Maintaining Supply Chain and Operational Resilience Amidst ongoing global uncertainties, challenges and shifting priorities, CDL remains steadfast in integrating sustainability principles into our business model and future-ready strategy.
rows.source_sentence: Maintaining Supply Chain and Operational Resilience Amidst ongoing global uncertainties, challenges and shifting priorities, CDL remains steadfast in integrating sustainability principles into our business model and future-ready strategy.

rows.text: Businesses play a crucial role in the global endeavour to achieve net-zero emissions and protect nature.
rows.source_sentence: Businesses play a crucial role in the global endeavour to achieve net-zero emissions and protect nature.

rows.text: The health of our planet is inextricably linked to the resilience of our people, economies and businesses.
rows.source_sentence: The health of our planet is inextricably linked to the resilience of our people, economies and businesses.

rows.text: In September 2024, the Singapore Exchange Regulation (SGX RegCo) announced that beginning with financial year (FY) 2025, all listed issuers will be required to report their Scope 1 and Scope 2 greenhouse gases (GHG) emissions, incorporating the climate-related requirements aligned with the International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) Sustainability Disclosure Standards issued by the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB).
rows.source_sentence: In September 2024, the Singapore Exchange Regulation (SGX RegCo) announced that beginning with financial year (FY) 2025, all listed issuers will be required to report their Scope 1 and Scope 2 greenhouse gases (GHG) emissions, incorporating the climate-related requirements aligned with the International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) Sustainability Disclosure Standards issued by the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB).

rows.text: Larger issuers by market capitalisation will likely need to report Scope 3 GHG emissions from FY2026.
rows.source_sentence: Larger issuers by market capitalisation will likely need to report Scope 3 GHG emissions from FY2026.

rows.text: We have been pragmatically integrating sustainability solutions into our GET (Growth, Enhancement and Transformation) strategy, focusing on four key sustainability pillars – Integration, Innovation, Investment and Impact – with four key deliverables: “Decarbonisation”, “Digitalisation and Innovation”, “Disclosure and Communication”, and “Defence through mitigation and adaptation”.
rows.source_sentence: We have been pragmatically integrating sustainability solutions into our GET (Growth, Enhancement and Transformation) strategy, focusing on four key sustainability pillars – Integration, Innovation, Investment and Impact – with four key deliverables: “Decarbonisation”, “Digitalisation and Innovation”, “Disclosure and Communication”, and “Defence through mitigation and adaptation”.

rows.text: Implemented a carbon sequestration and activation system for Ready Mixed Concrete for the clubhouse structures at Copen Grand.
rows.source_sentence: At our Executive Condominium (EC) project, Copen Grand, we implemented a carbon sequestration and activation system for Ready Mixed Concrete for the clubhouse structures.

rows.text: The concrete at Copen Grand has up to 80% cement replacement and uses carbon dioxide to enhance the properties of the concrete.
rows.source_sentence: The concrete has up to 80% cement replacement and uses carbon dioxide to enhance the properties of the concrete.

rows.text: Replaced diesel-powered generators at Irwell Hill Residences project site with an energy storage system, reducing construction-related carbon emissions by up to 80%.
rows.source_sentence: In 2022, we replaced diesel-powered generators at our Irwell Hill Residences project site with an energy storage system, reducing construction-related carbon emissions by up to 80%.

rows.text: The ‘We Love Our Planet’ exhibition highlighted the indispensable role of nature and biodiversity in supporting ecosystem resilience and addressing the climate crisis.
rows.source_sentence: This exhibition highlighted the indispensable role of nature and biodiversity in supporting ecosystem resilience and addressing the climate crisis.

rows.text: CDL integrates sustainability at the highest governance level to enable strategic oversight of ESG issues for long-term value creation.
rows.source_sentence: At CDL, integrating sustainability at the highest governance level enables strategic oversight of ESG issues for long-term value creation.

rows.text: CDL’s sustainability governance, management and disclosures are in line with or ahead of global best practices and SGX RegCo’s mandate on climate disclosures and board supervision.
rows.source_sentence: The Company’s sustainability governance, management and disclosures are in line with or ahead of the global best practices and SGX RegCo’s mandate on climate disclosures and board supervision.

rows.text: 30% of CDL’s ExCo members’ remuneration is contingent on hitting the Group’s ESG targets, with respective weightages for Environmental, Governance and Social targets.
rows.source_sentence: 30% of our ExCo members’ remuneration is contingent on hitting the Group’s ESG targets, with a respective weightage of 5% for Environmental, 10% for Governance targets and 15% for Social targets.
